untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparative ranking analysis across peer group instruments on multiple timeframes (10-year, 5-year, 1-year, 1-month). This requires cross-instrument relative strength comparison and hierarchical timeframe ranking logic that cannot be expressed using single-instrument technical indicators. Specifically: (1) No indicator exists for 'ranked #1 among peer group' comparison, (2) Multi-timeframe hierarchical ranking with veto logic ('longer_timeframes_override_shorter') requires inter-instrument data aggregation unavailable in single-candle indicator set, (3) Exit condition 'Loses top ranking on any timeframe >= 1-year' requires dynamic peer group comparison not supported by allowed operators. This is a portfolio-level meta-signal requiring external ranking engine, not a technical indicator rule.
translation_notes: SCHWAGER_DRY_0_0 describes a systematic multi-timeframe comparative strength methodology that transcends traditional single-instrument technical analysis. The signal requires: (1) calculation of relative strength metrics vs. 3-5 peer instruments, (2) ranking across 5 hierarchical timeframes, (3) application of hierarchical veto logic, (4) continuous monitoring of rank degradation. Cannot be translated to technical indicator rules without comparative ranking framework.
